sql_array: CREATE TABLE if not exists test_data (id UInt32, x_value Float64, y_value Float64, category String) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT covarSamp(x_value, y_value) FROM (SELECT x_value, y_value FROM test_data WHERE id = ALL (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE category = 'A'));
SELECT count(*) AS record_count, covarSamp(x_value, y_value) FROM (SELECT x_value, y_value FROM test_data WHERE category IN (SELECT category FROM (SELECT DISTINCT category FROM test_data)));
SELECT covarSamp(x_value, y_value) FROM (SELECT x_value, y_value FROM test_data GROUP BY category HAVING covarSamp(x_value, y_value) IS NOT NULL);
SELECT covarSamp(x_value, y_value) FROM (SELECT x_value, y_value FROM (SELECT x_value, y_value, id FROM test_data) temp WHERE id = ALL (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE x_value > 0));
SELECT covarSamp(x_value + 7.5, y_value * 1.2) FROM (SELECT x_value, y_value FROM test_data WHERE id = ANY (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE x_value BETWEEN 0 AND 15));
SELECT SUM(covarSamp(x_value, y_value)) FROM (SELECT x_value, y_value FROM test_data GROUP BY category) WHERE category = ALL (SELECT category FROM test_data WHERE y_value < 0);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, x_value, y_value, category) VALUES (7, -10.0, NULL, 'D'), (8, 1.5, 2.5, 'A'), (9, NULL, NULL, 'C');
SELECT covarSamp(x_value, y_value) FROM (SELECT x_value, y_value FROM test_data WHERE category IN (SELECT category FROM test_data GROUP BY category HAVING COUNT(*) > 1)) WHERE y_value IS NOT NULL;
